description_long: This is a rustic wooden table with a rectangular top and sturdy, blocky legs. The tabletop features a raised edge along its perimeter, likely to prevent items from sliding off. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a weathered, natural appearance suitable for outdoor or utilitarian use. There is a horizontal support beam connecting the legs for added stability. The table's design is simple and functional, with no visible decorative embellishments. Its robust construction suggests it is built to withstand frequent use in public or communal spaces.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden table with a raised edge and visible wood grain, supported by thick legs and a horizontal brace. Its rustic, utilitarian design is ideal for outdoor or communal settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop with raised edges and both front legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the tabletop and the raised edge, with one leg and the support beam visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge of the tabletop and both rear legs, with the support beam running horizontally.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the tabletop thickness and support structure from the other side.
